name: WLF_LEARN_EVENT
description: Table to store learn event information.

columns.Name: EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: EVENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the event, like LearningRecordCompletion.

columns.Name: EVENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Datetime when the event was raised.

columns.Name: EVENT_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: The person identifier who raised the event.

columns.Name: EVENT_PERSONA
columns.Comments: The persona who raised the event: (Learner, Manager, Specialist).

columns.Name: EVENT_SYSTEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Even raised thru UI or through a background job.

columns.Name: EVENT_SOURCE
columns.Comments: EVENT_SOURCE

columns.Name: SUBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: SUBJECT_ID

columns.Name: SUBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: SUBJECT_TYPE

columns.Name: EVENT_STATUS
columns.Comments: EVENT_STATUS

columns.Name: EVENT_PHASE
columns.Comments: EVENT_PHASE

columns.Name: EVENT_CONSUMERS_COUNT
columns.Comments: EVENT_CONSUMERS_COUNT

columns.Name: EVENT_CONSUMERS
columns.Comments: EVENT_CONSUMERS

columns.Name: EVENT_PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: EVENT_PROCESSED_DATE

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: OTHER_INFO
columns.Comments: OTHER_INFO

columns.Name: EVENT_OWNER
columns.Comments: Represents owner of the event.
